response: Acme Corp, headquartered in Austin, TX, reported a total revenue of $54.4 million for the year, marking an impressive year-over-year growth of 18%. The company's quarterly revenues were $12.3 million in Q1, $14.1 million in Q2, $11.8 million in Q3, and $16.2 million in Q4. With a dedicated team of 342 employees, Acme Corp continues to demonstrate strong financial performance.
